Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Legacy Plumbing to get the job done right.

“When a pipe burst in our 1930s Ansley Park home during last January's freeze, Legacy had a team here in 45 minutes. They not only fixed the immediate issue but showed me where other vulnerable spots were in our old plumbing system. Six months later, their maintenance plan caught another weak joint before it failed.”

Marcus T. Emergency Plumbing
Mar 15, 2025

“Our Dunwoody home's water heater died right before family arrived for Thanksgiving. Legacy installed a new heat pump model that handles our hard water beautifully. The technician even adjusted our whole-house pressure to prevent stress on the old pipes upstairs. Five months later, our energy bills are noticeably lower.”

Elena R. Water Heater Services
Jan 22, 2025

“We wanted to update our Virginia-Highland bungalow's bathroom without losing its charm. Legacy designed plumbing that accommodated the original tile work while adding modern water efficiency. They coordinated perfectly with our carpenter and preserved the heart pine floors we'd worried about protecting.”

James and Laurie K. Bathroom Remodeling
Apr 5, 2025

“After three plumbers couldn't solve our recurring drain issues in our Brookhaven home, Legacy's camera found roots growing through a poorly sealed joint. Their hydro-jetting cleared it completely, and the root inhibitor treatment has kept it clear through Atlanta's rainy spring. Finally - a permanent solution!”

Nina P. Drain Cleaning
May 18, 2025

“The leak detection service saved us thousands. Legacy found moisture under our Buckhead home's foundation that six other inspections missed. Their trenchless pipe replacement minimized disruption to our landscaping and was completed in one day. The detailed report helped with our insurance claim too.”

David W. Pipe Repair
Feb 10, 2025

“Our Inman Park loft had mysterious water stains appearing on the ceiling. Legacy's thermal imaging found a condensation issue between floors that our building's maintenance team had overlooked. Their repair was clean and efficient, and they followed up twice to ensure everything stayed dry during Atlanta's humid summer.”

Sophia M. Leak Detection
Jun 30, 2025
Legacy Plumbing

Trusted plumbing professionals serving Atlanta, GA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
